scene_support: unmarked asphalt roadway between parked cars
edit_template: Add a clear white centerline along the road
planner_edit_plan: Paint a single continuous white centerline down the middle of the visible roadway segment to clarify vehicle paths and reduce conflicts.
critic_notes: The scene/place is unchanged and the only noticeable edit is a new white line on the roadway, which looks visually coherent. However, the requested intervention was a clear white centerline down the middle of the roadway; the added line is positioned along the right side of the travel lane (closer to the curb), functioning more like an edge line/parking boundary rather than a center lane line. Repair: repaint a single continuous white line centered between the two sides of the carriageway with correct perspective/width, and avoid shifting it toward the curb.

scene_support: road edge near right curb with debris
edit_template: Clean debris and grime from the curbside pavement
planner_edit_plan: Remove scattered leaves, dirt, and small debris along the right curb and roadway edge so the surface looks maintained and safer for walking and driving.
critic_notes: The scene geometry and all major elements (cars, houses, trees, curb line) remain the same, indicating the same place is preserved. The visible change is confined to the right curb/road-edge area where leaf litter/debris appears reduced/removed, with no noticeable alterations elsewhere. The cleaned edge blends naturally with surrounding pavement texture and lighting, making it physically coherent and a plausible instance of surface cleaning. If further improvement is needed, remove a few remaining small specks near the right curb to make the cleaning effect slightly more consistent along the entire edge.

scene_support: large street trees overhanging the roadway
edit_template: Trim back low branches over the roadway and sidewalk
planner_edit_plan: Prune the tree branches extending over the street and sidewalk to improve sightlines and reduce visual obstruction near parked vehicles.
critic_notes: The scene/camera and surrounding objects (cars, buildings, road) are preserved with no noticeable global style shift. However, the overhanging canopy/low branches over the roadway and sidewalk do not appear meaningfully trimmed—tree shape and branch extent look essentially unchanged. To satisfy the lever, visibly remove/prune the lowest limb sections extending into the street/sidewalk (creating a clearer gap above the road edge and near the parked vehicles) while keeping the rest of the scene untouched.
